---
title: Quantum Meets AI International Conference 2026 
---

Conference dates: [July 13, 2026]{style="background-color:gold; padding:0.2em"}

Venue: Ghulam Ishaq Khan Institute of Information Technology, Topi, Pakistan

The conference will bring together students, researchers, academics, and professionals to explore recent advances in quantum computing and emerging quantum technologies. Participants will gain practical insight into how the field is moving from fundamental research toward real-world applications through expert talks, experimental perspectives, and selected insights from industry professionals. The event will also highlight current challenges, future opportunities, and provide a valuable platform for networking and collaboration within the quantum ecosystem.

## Speakers

1. Dr. Muhammad Imran (Max Planck Institute, Germany;  Spin qubits for quantum computing )
2. Dr. Onur Pusuluk (Kadir Has University; Thermodynamics to Information Processing and Computing)
3. Dr. Madiha Khalid (NUST, Quantum Computing)
4. Dr. Mubashar Khan (NED, Pakistan; Quantum Key Distributions)
5. Dr. Abu Bakr (University of Manitoba, Canada;  Introduction to Quantum-based Deep Learning)
6. Dr. Nasir Javed (GIKI; Experimental Realization of Qubits)
7. Mr. Mazhar Javed (GIKI; Quantum Architectures)

## Student Research Talks Introduced
Selected students will deliver short research presentations (~10 minutes each) during the conference.

Outstanding student presentations will be recognized with cash prizes:

🥇 1st Prize: PKR 5,000
🥈 2nd Prize: PKR 4,000
🥉 3rd Prize: PKR 3,000

## Registration
Click here for the registration [form](form.qmd). Registrations close on June 25, 2026. Registration fees:

- For general audience: 2,000 PKR
- MS/PhD. applicants to GIK (Fall 2026): 1,500 PKR

## Contact Information
For queries related to the event, send your emails to `drn@giki.edu.pk`
